diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class and types (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, types re-exports
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports the Hono class and core types for public API consumption
+- Copy-safe detail: Module doc comment present, single Hono export from ./hono, type re-exports organized into three type groups
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, Schema, Types (Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler), HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, HTTPResponseError, ExtractInput, MergeTypedResponse, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, IntersectNonAnyTypes, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, ToSchema, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, ResponseFormat, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, StatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for Hono including values, routes, handlers, interfaces, and utility types
+- Copy-safe detail: Section dividers with lines of slashes, eslint-disable comment for no-explicit-any, extensive conditional types with 10+ handler arities (x2 through x10)
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, Router, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Public Hono class extending HonoBase with default router configuration (SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback)
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, constructor accepts HonoOptions, single class extending HonoBase with inline router initialization
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire (deprecated)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, compose, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, NotFoundHandler, OnHandlerInterface, Router, RouterRoute, Env, Schema, RouterRoute, HonoOptions, GetPath, MountOptions, COMPOSED_HANDLER, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, _basePath, routes, mergePath, getPath, getPathNoStrict
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class implementing routing (get/post/put/delete/on/use), request handling via #dispatch, error/not-found handlers, and request methods (fetch/request/fire)
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, private _basePath and #path, private private methods prefixed with #, class implements all HTTP methods via forEach, mount supports custom handler/options
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with req, event, executionCtx, res, header, set, get, var, newResponse, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, render, setRenderer, layout, exec, set, clearCache
+- Internal names noticed: Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, Data, Renderer, DefaultRenderer, ResponseOrInit, ContextOptions, SetHeaders, SetHeadersOptions, Text, Html, Json, Layout, PropsForRenderer, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, H, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, Result, Env, Input, ResponseHeader, BaseMime, JSONParsed, InvalidJSONValue, JSONValue, IsAny, MergeTypedResponse, TypedResponse, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, Response, HonoRequest, HTMLRespond content-type constant
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/headers, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: Request context class managing response lifecycle, headers, vars, rendering (text/json/html), redirects, not-found handling, and providing access to env/execution context
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, private fields prefixed with #, multiple method overloads for type inference, content-type constant TEXT_PLAIN, setDefaultContentType helper, createResponseInstance wrapper
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw, path, param, query, queries, header, addValidatedData, valid, json, text, arrayBuffer, blob, bytes, formData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath, cloneRawRequest
+- Internal names noticed: Body, BodyCache, GET_MATCH_RESULT, parseBody, tryDecodeURIComponent, tryDecode, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, Input, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, ParamKeyToRecord, InputToDataByTarget, ValidationTargets, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, CustomHeader, RequestHeader
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request handling class providing access to raw request, url, path, method, query params, path params, headers, body parsing (json/text/formData/arrayBuffer/blob), validated data, route info
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, body caching for cloned requests, #validatedData and #matchResult private fields, GET_MATCH_RESULT exported as unique symbol, cloneRawRequest handles both fresh and cached bodies
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single export containing a unique symbol for matching result identifier
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line file, exports unique symbol for use by HonoRequest
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, ParseBodyOptions, ParseBodyDetailed, SimplifyBodyData, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for form-data and url-encoded data, supporting all/dot options for nested and array handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, parseBody detects content-type and delegates to parseFormData or returns empty object, parseFormData handles conversion with options, nested object creation via dot notation, array coalescing via all option
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: Index, Handler, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition function coordinating handler execution via dispatch, error handling via onError, not-found handling via onNotFound
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, returns dispatch function with index state, index tracked across async calls to prevent multiple next(), errors caught and passed to onError, not-found used when index === middleware.length
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP exception class extending Error for programmatic 4xx/5xx errors with optional response object
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, constructor accepts status with default 500, optional res/message/cause, getResponse creates or returns existing response with body/headers
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/client, ./client/utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client module re-exporting hc function for HTTP client proxy, response parsing utility, DetailedError class for client errors
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, delegates all exports to ./client module, no source code here
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, UnionToIntersection, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, ClientRequestOptions, FormValue, ValidationTargets, WebSocket, Client, Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/types, ./client/types, ./client/utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client proxy builder creating request objects with url, method, body, headers, query/param support, WebSockets via $ws method
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, hc accepts base URL and options, createProxy wraps callback in Proxy with get/apply traps, ClientRequestImpl manages state for each method, $ws returns new WebSocket, removeIndexString strips /index paths
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest (generated by hc), ClientResponse (generated by fetch requests), hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PickResponseByStatusCode, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, ExpandAllMethod, StandardMethods, MethodNameAll, TypedURL, HonoURL, BuildPath, BuildPathname, BuildSearch
+- Internal names noticed: Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, Schema, Hono, HonoBase, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ClientResponse, ReadableStream, Blob, FormData, ArrayBuffer, Headers, URL, WebSocket, Request, Response, RequestInit
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./hono-base, ./router, ./types, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types, utils/status-code constants
+- Plain-English summary: Client API types defining hc builder pattern, request/response shapes, parameter inference, URL building with protocol/host/path/query, proxy callback system for path construction
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, BuildSearchParamsFn serializes query as URLSearchParams, ClientRequest created via proxy, ClientResponse mirrors Node fetch Response with body/stream methods, ExpandAllMethod spreads $all to all methods, ApplyParam recursively builds URLs from path parameters
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: isObject, ObjectType, ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./client/fetch-result-please, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for path building, URL parameter substitution, query serialization, protocol swapping, object deep merging for options
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, mergePath normalizes forward slashes, replaceUrlParam replaces path params, buildSearchParams converts query object to URLSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol swaps http/ws, deepMerge copies and recurses into nested objects, isObject returns true for plain objects, removeIndexString strips /index from URLs
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex, detectResponseType
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Lightweight fetch result parser that detects response type (json/text), extracts body, throws DetailedError with status/details for non-ok responses
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, nullBodyResponses set excludes 101/204/205/304 from having body, detectResponseType checks content-type for json, fetchRP awaits, extracts via response.json() or .text(), DetailedError carries statusCode/detail/log/code
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire, handle
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./handler, ../../types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter registering Hono app via addEventListener('fetch', handle(app)), options support custom fetch fallback
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, fire sets up fetch event listener, handle is main handler factory, opts.fetch used as fallback when app returns 404
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names noticed: Handler, FetchEvent, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./types, ../../types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch event handler that chains Hono app.fetch with optional fallback fetch for 404s
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, Handler accepts evt, responds via evt.respondWith, catches app.fetch result, passes through to event target
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: FetchEvent interface for Service Worker with clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, respondWith
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, four additional fields beyond ExtendableEvent (clientId/handled/preloadResponse/resultingClientId), respondWith takes Response or PromiseLike
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.t
